title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF TAGABACA IN THE CITY OF BUTUAN

chunks.text:
H. No. 937 / 55 OG No. 26, 4801 (June 29, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2194, May 07, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF TAGABACA IN THE CITY OF BUTUAN

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Tagabaca in the City of Butuan is converted into a barrio of said city to be known as the barrio of Tagabaca.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, May 7, 1959.
